svg.text: AI-Enhanced Data Pipeline — Airflow + Spark + Ollama + Trino RCA PoC
Namespace: clmanalytics-dev1 · Internal LLM Only (no external API) · MEA + DBNotifier/Teams · No Gmail · No AWS · No Slack
① Collect: dag_id, task_id, error, logs
⑦ Send HTML email via MEA
⑧ Send Teams alert via DBNotifier
Airflow Metadata DB: PostgreSQL (shared) · Fernet key: K8s Secret · Executor: KubernetesExecutor
